props.ChoiceText: What was called justice by one house became murder by another before the body had cooled.
props.ChoiceBio: A feud killing taught you that patrons call vengeance by whatever name keeps it respectable.

0.TransitionText: Because a feud killing taught you that patrons call vengeance by whatever name keeps it respectable, silence, planning, and deliberate death remained your trade.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Assassin, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a feud killing taught you that patrons call vengeance by whatever name keeps it respectable, killing widened back out from secrecy into paid violence.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a feud killing taught you that patrons call vengeance by whatever name keeps it respectable, killing no longer bought protection, and you slipped back into the wider criminal world.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.
